calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng for Administrator.

Ms. Ng explained that the $1,100.00 paid in attorney's fees had to do with a Wells Fargo account that was based in Virginia, that for some reason the prior Administrator had the account held in Trust as Trustee, that there was never a Trust, that the Attorney's made calls and got it straightened out, and that it resulted in a recovery of $68,000.00. The Petition for Final Distribution is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Continued To Oct-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-11-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Kerin McBride.

The Court asked counsel for legal authority to proceed without bond. Ms. Ng stated that the trust is still active, that the will has been presented to the court and that a copy of the trust was presented in camera, that the trustees are the husband and sons, that they have signed waivers of bond, that there is not probate, that there are no letters to be issued and confirmed that Ms. McBride is able to be bonded for the full amount. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration with full bond (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos & Deputy Neves. (Not Reported)
